summary: Completed frontend testing of Evolution Growth System feature. All tests passed (100%). Sidebar 'Crescita continua' section with Layers icon (green #34C77B) is correctly positioned below 'Accelera la crescita'. Navigation to 'growth-system' works. GrowthSystemPage displays hero, intro block with 3 points, and 3 expandable level cards (Foundation, Growth, Scale) with correct content and CTAs. No forbidden words (abbonamento, servizi, upsell) found.
critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar 'Crescita continua' section uses Layers icon with green color (#34C77B) - CORRECT
Sidebar 'Evolution Growth System' item has data-testid='sidebar-growth-system' - CORRECT
Active sidebar item has green boxShadow (rgb(52, 199, 123) 3px 0px 0px 0px inset) instead of yellow - CORRECT
TrendingUp icon turns green when active - CORRECT
GrowthSystemPage Hero has data-testid='growth-hero' with title 'Evolution Growth System' and 'farla crescere' text - CORRECT
GrowthSystemPage Intro has data-testid='growth-intro' with 3 points (Aumentare vendite, Migliorare, Espandere) - CORRECT
Level 1 Foundation card has data-testid='level-card-foundation' with title 'Facciamo funzionare il sistema' - CORRECT
Foundation items: Monitoraggio funnel, Controllo KPI, Ottimizzazioni base, Supporto tecnico - CORRECT
Foundation CTA 'Sblocca Foundation' with data-testid='level-cta-foundation' - CORRECT
Level 2 Growth card has data-testid='level-card-growth' with title 'Aumentiamo le vendite' - CORRECT
Growth items: Gestione ads, Ottimizzazione funnel, Miglioramento conversioni, Supporto contenuti - CORRECT
Growth CTA 'Sblocca Growth' with data-testid='level-cta-growth' - CORRECT
Level 3 Scale card has data-testid='level-card-scale' with title 'Espandiamo il business' - CORRECT
Scale items: Nuovi prodotti, Funnel avanzati, Strategie avanzate, Affiancamento diretto - CORRECT
Scale CTA 'Sblocca Scale' with data-testid='level-cta-scale' - CORRECT
Card expansion/collapse works correctly - Foundation expanded by default - CORRECT
No forbidden words (abbonamento, servizi, upsell) found on page - CORRECT
context_for_next_testing_agent: Evolution Growth System feature fully tested. Navigation: Login as admin → Switch to Partner view → In sidebar, expand 'Crescita continua' section → Click 'Evolution Growth System'. The page shows 3 expandable level cards (Foundation, Growth, Scale). Foundation is expanded by default. Clicking a card expands/collapses it. All data-testid attributes are correctly implemented.
